It presents with a range of symptoms, from mild to severe, including fever, cough, and shortness of breath [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_id]. The disease was first identified in late 2019 and has since become a global pandemic [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_id]. Prevention measures include vaccination, wearing masks, and social distancing [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_id].
